title: Yctor Arms
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Yctor Arms''' was a weapons manufacturer during the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The company specialized in collector's items and functional museum reproductions. One of their products was a [[black-powder pistol]].

==Appearances==
*"[[Side Trip]]" {{Reprint|Side Trip}} {{Mo}} {{C|Information from Roleplaying Game Statistics section}}
